title: bessera fistulosa
intro: Bessera fistulosa, also known as the thread-leaved bessera, is a perennial plant species belonging to the orchid family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bessera fistulosa include relief from various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
